case_title: O'NEIL, JAY DBA HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION INC. VS. PHILLIP MALIK

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
THE COURT ORDER DATED MARCH 17, 2008. OF MAY-23-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,941.99 FILED BY O'NEIL, JAY DBA HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MALIK, PHILLIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MALIK, PHILLIP AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT O'NEIL, JAY DBA HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MALIK, PHILLIP

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'NEIL, JAY DBA HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE(S). NO EXHIBTS RETAINED.JUDGE PRO TEM STEVE LAU; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED.CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'NEIL, JAY DBA HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION INC.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT'S COUNTER-CLAIM HEARING SET FOR JAN-28-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'NEIL, JAY DBA HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALIK, PHILLIP $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MALIK, PHILLIP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT O'NEIL, JAY DBA HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

ORDER (SC-105A) ON "DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO RELEASE BINDER OF DESIGN IMAGES TO DEFENDANT". "BOTH PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR HEARING; PLAINTIFF MAY PROVIDE THE COURT WITH HIS WRITTEN CONSENT TO RELEASE THE BINDER TO DEFENDANT".

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR COURT ORDER DATED MARCH 17, 2008. BOTH PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR HEARING; PLAINTIFF MAY PROVIDE THE COURT WITH HIS WRITTEN CONSENT TO RELEASE THE BINDER TO DEFENDANT, PER COMMISSIONER SLAVIT. HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ORDER (SC-105A) DATED MAY 30, 2008. "DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT, TO WIT: BINDER OF DESIGN IMAGES, WILL BE RELEASED TO PLAINTIFF, UNLESS PARTIES APPEAR TO SHOE CAUSE", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY OF ORDER MAILED TO PARTIES.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR SC-105A: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER. "HEARING TO SHOW CAUSE WHY DEFENDANT'S EXHIBIT SHOULD NOT BE RELEASED TO PLAINTIFF". HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE SC-105A: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER. OF JUN-20-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE(S). THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE BINDER LABELED "HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION" CONTAINING VARIOUS DESIGN PHOTOS AND DRAWINGS SHALL BE RELEASED TO DEFENDANT MALIK, ALONG WITH THOSE EXHIBITS ORIGINALLY SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT. THE REMAINING DOCUMENTS SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF HAMMERHEAD CONSTRUCTION SHALL BE RELEASED TO PLAINTIFF AT ITS REQUEST. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506). (DEFENDANT'S WHITE EXHIBIT BINDER IS LOCATED IN ROOM 103, SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT).
